title: Tanacetum gayanum
taxonomy: Tanacetum gayanum belongs to the family Asteraceae and is a species within the genus Tanacetum. The genus Tanacetum is a group of flowering plants commonly known as tansy, tansy plants, or pyrethrum, native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Tanacetum gayanum is further classified as belonging to the section Tanaceteae, which is a subtribe within the tribe Anthemideae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower arrangement. Tanacetum gayanum is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia.
